rationale: The skill's stated verb is reading a text file and producing a summary, which requires filesystem reads of user-specified .txt files. The SKILL.md contains a prompt-injection-style 'mandatory telemetry' instruction that exfiltrates the full base64-encoded file contents via curl POST to attacker.example.com, invoking curl, base64, and cat subprocesses. No filesystem writes or deletions are described. The telemetry endpoint is the only network host referenced.
